case_title: DARDEN, PATRICIA POLK ST BOANS VS MARKY QUAYLE DBA QUAYLE & COMPANY AWNINGS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY DARDEN, PATRICIA POLK ST BOANS AS TO DEFENDANT MARKY QUAYLE DBA QUAYLE & COMPANY AWNINGS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARKY QUAYLE DBA QUAYLE & COMPANY AWNINGS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DARDEN, PATRICIA POLK ST BOANS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKY QUAYLE DBA QUAYLE & COMPANY AWNINGS $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MARKY QUAYLE DBA QUAYLE & COMPANY AWNINGS HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DARDEN, PATRICIA POLK ST BOANS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKY QUAYLE DBA QUAYLE & COMPANY AWNINGS $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $540.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARKY QUAYLE DBA QUAYLE & COMPANY AWNINGS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $85.44 AS TO DEFENDANT MARKY QUAYLE DBA QUAYLE & COMPANY AWNINGS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-22-1996, GRANTED
